mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_plans (user_id, plan_name, start_date, end_date, plan_content, create_time, update_time, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{planContent}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isPublic})
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_plans SET plan_name = #{planName}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, plan_content = #{planContent}, update_time = #{updateTime}, is_public = #{isPublic} WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM travel_plans WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM travel_plans WHERE is_public = 1
AND user_id = #{userId}
